childhood.familyBackground: Born to Indian Sindhi family that fled to India during 1947 partition.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1947 분할 동안 인도로 도피한 인도 신디 가정에서 출생.
childhood.earlyLife: Founded Aspect Development (sold to i2 Technologies for $9.3B in 2000); founded Symphony Technology Group (private equity).
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Aspect Development 창립(2000년 i2 Technologies에 93억 달러 매각); Symphony Technology Group(사모펀드) 창립.

capitalOrigin.explanationKo: Aspect Development 매각 + Symphony Technology Group PE.

careerTimeline.event: Sold Aspect Development to i2 Technologies for $9.3B (peak dot-com era).
careerTimeline.eventKo: Aspect Development를 i2 Technologies에 93억 달러 매각(닷컴 정점 시대).

careerTimeline.event: Founded Symphony Technology Group (PE firm) and Wadhwani Foundation.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Symphony Technology Group(PE 회사)·Wadhwani Foundation 창립.

careerTimeline.event: Personal net worth at $5.5B per Forbes Real-Time. Continues Symphony Technology Group operations.
careerTimeline.eventKo: 포브스 실시간 기준 개인 순자산 55억 달러. Symphony Technology Group 운영 계속.

turningPoints.decisionKo: 닷컴 정점에 Aspect Development 93억 달러 매각

moneyMechanics.primaryRevenueKo: Symphony Technology Group PE + 사적 투자
moneyMechanics.moatKo: Aspect Development 정점 매각 + 30+년 기술 인맥
moneyMechanics.luckVsSkillKo: 운(35%): 닷컴 정점 매각 타이밍. 실력(65%): 30+년 기술 PE 운영.

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder of Aspect Development (sold for $9.3B in 2000) and Symphony Technology Group (PE).
personalTraits.knownForKo: Aspect Development(2000 93억 달러 매각)·Symphony Technology Group(PE) 창립자.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Wadhwani Foundation funds job creation and education in India, US, and developing countries.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: Wadhwani Foundation이 인도·미국·개발도상국 일자리 창출·교육 자금.
personalTraits.controversies: Standard PE-industry portfolio company labor and operational debates.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 표준 PE 산업 포트폴리오 회사 노동·운영 논쟁.

quotes.text: We sold Aspect for nine billion. The foundation is how I spent it.
quotes.textKo: 우리는 Aspect를 90억 달러에 팔았다. 재단이 내가 그것을 쓴 방법이다.

sajuConnection.summary: Byeong-Ja day pillar in Shin month — 'siksin-gyeok', steady output.
sajuConnection.summaryKo: 병자 일주 + 신월 식신격은 다중 경력 자수성가와 호응.
